plugins.name: synchestra-cli
plugins.description: Synchestra CLI plugin: skills, commands, and hooks that teach AI agents how to use the synchestra CLI

plugins.name: specscore-cli
plugins.description: SpecScore CLI plugin: skills that teach AI agents how to use the specscore CLI for spec navigation, linting, and lifecycle operations

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Methodology skills for spec-driven development: specify, plan, build, verify, review, ship. Depends on synchestra-cli and specscore-cli.
